_comment: TS-IMA-CC-PC_01 — Create a complete Price Compliance contract (IMA_CC_PC_01). Data-driven from JSON. 'dates' are shared by the modal, eligibility rows (validFrom/validTo) and calculation rows (startDate/endDate); any row may override by adding its own date fields. eligibilityRows and calculationRows are arrays so additional rows can be appended without touching the spec.
